situation: audit-2026-07-07-030 FE-M-001: Vite dev server binds 0.0.0.0 without allowedHosts — LAN-wide access to trading API proxy via IP (vite.config.ts:14)
action: Add server.allowedHosts=['localhost','127.0.0.1'] to restrict Host header; LAN devices using IP directly get rejected by Vite. Keeps host=0.0.0.0 for container dev but closes LAN attack surface.
outcome_evidence: commit c3c323d on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395, pushed to origin. Diff adds 3 lines (comment + allowedHosts array). Vite 5.4 supports this option (introduced 5.1).
next_suggestion: 派生 FE-M-002 (CSP header) → 下一个 route-fix
FE-M-003 localStorage plaintext key 需要 aiStore.ts 改动，可能 direction-shift
等用户 merge opt-frontend-1783366395 后再派后续 fix

audit_findings.finding: Vite dev server host=0.0.0.0 without allowedHosts exposes trading API proxy to entire LAN
